post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.desc_en: Returns the products that compete with a target ASIN in Amazon SERPs, i.e. listings that rank for the same keywords as the target. Use it to map the competitive landscape of any Amazon listing; results are scoped to the supplied ASIN, location, and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.description_zh: 返回在 Amazon SERP 中与目标 ASIN 争夺相同关键词的竞品商品,用于梳理某个 Listing 的竞争格局。结果按请求中的 ASIN、地区与语言限定。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.heading_zh: 查询亚马逊商品排名概览 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_product_rank_overview_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.desc_en: Returns organic and paid Amazon SERP ranking distributions for a batch of target products, letting you compare how multiple ASINs perform side by side within one location and language.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_p.description_zh: 为一批目标商品返回其在 Amazon 自然与付费 SERP 中的排名分布,便于在同一地区、语言下横向对比多个 ASIN 的表现。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.heading_zh: 查询亚马逊相关关键词 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_related_keywords_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.desc_en: Returns the keywords surfaced in Amazon's “Related Searches” block for a seed keyword, expanded recursively by search depth, to help build out a keyword set around a seed term.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_amazon_r.description_zh: 返回 Amazon “Related Searches” 模块中与种子关键词相关的关键词,可按搜索深度递归扩展,用于围绕种子词扩充关键词集。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.heading_zh: 查询 App Store 应用关键词交集 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_app_intersection_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.desc_en: Returns the keywords for which several App Store apps appear together in the same SERP, revealing the keyword overlap among the apps you supply in app_ids.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ap.description_zh: 返回多个 App Store 应用在同一 SERP 中共同出现的关键词,揭示 app_ids 中所列应用之间的关键词重叠。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ke.heading_zh: 查询 App Store 应用关键词 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_keywords_for_app_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ke.desc_en: Returns the keywords a target App Store app ranks for, together with keyword metrics and the app's ranking position for each keyword.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_apple_ke.description_zh: 返回目标 App Store 应用所排名的关键词,并附带关键词指标及该应用在每个关键词下的排名位置。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.heading_zh: 查询 Google Play 应用竞品 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_app_competitors_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.desc_en: Returns the apps that compete with a target Google Play app across its ranking keywords, including competitor app IDs plus search volume and ranking data on the shared keywords.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_a.description_zh: 返回在 Google Play 上与目标应用争夺相同排名关键词的竞品应用,包含竞品应用 ID 及共有关键词的搜索量与排名数据。

get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_av.desc_en: Returns the list of dates available for the first_date and second_date fields of the Domain Metrics by Categories endpoint. Call it first to learn which historical snapshots can be requested.
get_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_av.description_zh: 返回可用于 Domain Metrics by Categories 接口 first_date 与 second_date 字段的日期列表,通常先调用本接口确认可请求的历史快照。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.desc_en: Returns the Keyword Difficulty metric for up to 1,000 keywords in a single request, scoring how hard it is to break into the top-10 organic results for each keyword.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_b.description_zh: 单次请求最多为 1000 个关键词返回 Keyword Difficulty 指标,衡量每个关键词进入前 10 自然结果的难度。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_c.desc_en: Returns the Google product and service categories the domain ranks for, along with aggregated ranking and traffic data for the keywords under each category.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_c.description_zh: 返回域名在搜索中有排名关键词所属的 Google 产品与服务类目,并给出各类目下关键词的汇总排名与流量数据。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_c.desc_en: Returns the Google product and service categories associated with each supplied keyword; accepts up to 1,000 keywords per request.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_c.description_zh: 为每个传入关键词返回其关联的 Google 产品与服务类目,单次请求最多支持 1000 个关键词。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.heading_zh: 批量查询历史流量估算 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_historical_bulk_traffic_estimation_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.desc_en: Returns historical monthly traffic estimates for up to 1,000 domains over a chosen time range (data available from October 2020), broken down by organic, paid, featured snippet, and local pack results.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.description_zh: 为最多 1000 个域名返回所选时间范围内的历史月度流量估算(数据自 2020 年 10 月起),并按自然、付费、featured snippet 与 local pack 结果拆分。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.desc_en: Returns a domain's historical ranking distribution across SERP positions and its estimated monthly traffic for both organic and paid results over time.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_h.description_zh: 返回域名随时间变化的历史排名分布(各 SERP 位段)及自然与付费结果的月度估算流量。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns a comprehensive Google data profile for each supplied keyword, including cost-per-click, paid competition, search volume, search intent, monthly search history, plus SERP and backlink information; optional clickstream metrics are available via include_clickstream_data.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 为每个传入关键词返回完整的 Google 数据画像,涵盖 CPC、付费竞争度、搜索量、搜索意图、月度搜索历史以及 SERP 与外链信息;通过 include_clickstream_data 可附加点击流指标。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.heading_zh: 查询 Google Play 应用关键词 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_keywords_for_app_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns the keywords a target Google Play app ranks for, together with keyword metrics and the app's ranking position for each keyword.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 返回目标 Google Play 应用所排名的关键词,并附带关键词指标及该应用在每个关键词下的排名位置。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.desc_en: Returns keywords relevant to a target domain, each enriched with categories, last-month search volume, cost-per-click, paid competition, and the 12-month search volume trend.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_k.description_zh: 返回与目标域名相关的关键词,每个关键词附带类目、上月搜索量、CPC、付费竞争度以及近 12 个月的搜索量趋势。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_r.desc_en: Returns ranking and traffic data for individual web pages of a target domain, letting you review each page's ranking distribution and estimated monthly traffic from organic and paid search.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_r.description_zh: 返回目标域名各个网页的排名与流量数据,便于审视每个页面的排名分布及来自自然与付费搜索的月度估算流量。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.heading_zh: 查询 SERP 竞争域名 post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_serp_competitors_live
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.desc_en: Returns the domains ranking for a set of supplied keywords, along with each domain's SERP rankings, rating, estimated traffic, and visibility derived from those keywords.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_s.description_zh: 返回为一组指定关键词排名的域名,并给出各域名基于这些关键词的 SERP 排名、评分、估算流量与可见度。

post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_t.desc_en: Returns keywords drawn from the DataForSEO Keyword Database (over 7 billion keywords), each supplied with Google Ads metrics, product categories, and Google SERP data, filtered and sorted to your criteria.
post_dataforseo_dataforseo_labs_google_t.description_zh: 从 DataForSEO 关键词数据库(逾 70 亿关键词)返回关键词,每个关键词附带 Google Ads 指标、产品类目及 Google SERP 数据,并按所设条件筛选与排序。

asin.desc_en: Target product's Amazon ASIN; competitors are computed relative to this listing. Obtain it from the Amazon Products endpoint.
asin.title_zh: 目标商品的 Amazon ASIN,竞品以此 Listing 为基准计算。可从 Amazon Products 接口获取。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
tasks.time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

tasks.cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
tasks.cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks.result_count.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's result array.
tasks.result_count.title_zh: 本任务 result 数组中的元素数量。

tasks.path.desc_en: URL path segments of the endpoint that produced the task.
tasks.path.title_zh: 生成该任务的接口 URL 路径分段。

tasks.data.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the request.
tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.asin.desc_en: Product ASIN; in results, the ASIN this record describes.
tasks.result.asin.title_zh: 商品 ASIN;在结果中为该记录所描述的 ASIN。

tasks.result.location_code.desc_en: Location code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.location_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的地区代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.language_code.desc_en: Language code echoed from the request; null when no data applies.
tasks.result.language_code.title_zh: 从请求回传的语言代码;无对应数据时为 null。

tasks.result.total_count.desc_en: Total number of matching records in the database for this request, which may exceed the number returned.
tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

tasks.result.items_count.desc_en: Number of records returned in this items array.
tasks.result.items_count.title_zh: 本 items 数组中返回的记录数量。

tasks.result.items.desc_en: Returned records carrying the core data of this endpoint.
tasks.result.items.title_zh: 返回的记录,承载本接口的核心数据。

tasks.result.items.se_type.desc_en: Search engine type the data was collected from.
tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.asin.desc_en: Product ASIN; in results, the ASIN this record describes.
tasks.result.items.asin.title_zh: 商品 ASIN;在结果中为该记录所描述的 ASIN。

tasks.result.items.avg_position.desc_en: Average SERP position of the entity across the matched keywords.
tasks.result.items.avg_position.title_zh: 实体在匹配关键词上的平均 SERP 排名位置。

tasks.result.items.sum_position.desc_en: Sum of the entity's positions across the intersected keywords.
tasks.result.items.sum_position.title_zh: 实体在交集关键词上各排名位置之和。

tasks.result.items.intersections.desc_en: Number of keywords the entity shares with the target.
tasks.result.items.intersections.title_zh: 实体与目标共有的关键词数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.desc_en: Ranking metrics over the keywords this competitor shares with the target.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.title_zh: 该竞争方与目标共有关键词上的排名指标。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Ranking data from Amazon organic SERPs.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 来自 Amazon 自然 SERP 的排名数据。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks #1.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 实体排名第 1 的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 2-3.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 实体排名第 2 至 3 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 4-10.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 实体排名第 4 至 10 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 11-100.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 实体排名第 11 至 100 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Ranking data from Amazon paid SERPs.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 来自 Amazon 付费 SERP 的排名数据。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks #1.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 实体排名第 1 的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 2-3.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 实体排名第 2 至 3 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 4-10.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 实体排名第 4 至 10 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 11-100.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 实体排名第 11 至 100 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.competitor_metrics.am.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.desc_en: Ranking metrics over all keywords this entity ranks for, not just the shared ones.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.title_zh: 该主体所有排名关键词(而非仅共有关键词)上的排名指标。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.desc_en: Ranking data from Amazon organic SERPs.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.title_zh: 来自 Amazon 自然 SERP 的排名数据。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks #1.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.title_zh: 实体排名第 1 的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 2-3.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.title_zh: 实体排名第 2 至 3 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 4-10.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.title_zh: 实体排名第 4 至 10 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 11-100.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.title_zh: 实体排名第 11 至 100 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_s.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.desc_en: Ranking data from Amazon paid SERPs.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.title_zh: 来自 Amazon 付费 SERP 的排名数据。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks #1.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.title_zh: 实体排名第 1 的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 2-3.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.title_zh: 实体排名第 2 至 3 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 4-10.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.title_zh: 实体排名第 4 至 10 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.desc_en: Count of SERPs where the entity ranks in positions 11-100.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.title_zh: 实体排名第 11 至 100 位的 SERP 数量。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.desc_en: Total count of SERPs of this type that contain the entity.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.title_zh: 包含该实体的此类 SERP 总数。

tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.desc_en: Approximate average monthly search volume for the keyword.
tasks.result.items.full_metrics.amazon_p.title_zh: 关键词的近似月均搜索量。

asins.desc_en: Target products' ASINs to pull ranking data for in one batch; obtain each ASIN from the Amazon Products endpoint and supply them in uppercase.
asins.title_zh: 需批量获取排名数据的目标商品 ASIN 列表;每个 ASIN 可从 Amazon Products 接口获取,需以大写形式提供。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.

tasks.result.items.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.items.keyword.title_zh: 该记录所描述的关键词。

tasks.result.items.keyword_difficulty.desc_en: How hard it is to rank in the top-10 organic results for the keyword, on a 0-to-100 logarithmic scale derived from the link profiles of the current top-10 pages.
tasks.result.items.keyword_difficulty.title_zh: 关键词进入前 10 自然结果的难度,采用 0 至 100 的对数刻度,依据当前前 10 页面的外链情况计算。

target.desc_en: Target domain or subdomain to analyze; specify it without the https:// scheme and without the www. prefix.
target.title_zh: 要分析的目标域名或子域名;指定时不带 https:// 协议头,也不带 www. 前缀。

location_name.desc_en: Geographic target given by its full location name; supply either this or location_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

include_subcategories.desc_en: When true, results also span the subcategories of matched categories; when false, only top-level categories are considered.
include_subcategories.title_zh: 为 true 时,结果一并覆盖命中类目的子类目;为 false 时仅考虑顶层类目。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

historical_serp_mode.desc_en: Controls which SERPs are counted: live keeps only SERPs where the target currently ranks, while lost keeps SERPs where it ranked before but no longer does.
historical_serp_mode.title_zh: 控制纳入统计的 SERP 范围:live 仅保留目标当前仍有排名的 SERP,lost 则保留目标曾经有过、现已失去排名的 SERP。

item_types.desc_en: Restricts results to the listed SERP result types; the first type listed also determines the default ordering of results.
item_types.title_zh: 将结果限定为所列的 SERP 结果类型;数组中的首个类型同时决定结果的默认排序依据。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

tasks_error.desc_en: Number of tasks in the tasks array that returned an error.
tasks_error.title_zh: tasks 数组中以错误返回的任务数量。

tasks.desc_en: List of task objects, one per task in the request batch.
tasks.title_zh: 任务对象列表,请求批次中每个任务对应一项。

tasks.id.desc_en: Unique task identifier in UUID format.
tasks.id.title_zh: 任务在系统中的唯一标识,采用 UUID 格式。

tasks.status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
tasks.status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

tasks.status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
tasks.status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

tasks.data.title_zh: 对请求中所传参数的回传。

tasks.result.se_type.title_zh: 数据采集所来自的搜索引擎类型。

tasks.result.target.title_zh: 从请求回传的目标域名。

tasks.result.total_count.title_zh: 数据库中匹配本请求的记录总数,可能多于实际返回的条数。

location_name.title_zh: 以完整地区名称指定的地理目标;与 location_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

location_code.desc_en: Geographic target given by its numeric location code; supply either this or location_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
location_code.title_zh: 以数字地区代码指定的地理目标;与 location_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.

correlate.desc_en: When enabled, aligns the returned series with previously obtained datasets to smooth over inconsistencies introduced by database changes.
correlate.title_zh: 开启后,将返回的序列与此前获取的数据集对齐,以平滑因数据库变更带来的不一致。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Current price shown in the listing.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: Listing 中显示的当前价格。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.desc_en: Regular (non-promotional) price shown in the listing.
tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: Listing 中显示的常规(非促销)价格。

tasks.result.items.ranked_serp_element.s.title_zh: 开发者商店页的 URL。

language_name.desc_en: Target language given by its full name; supply either this or language_code. Look up valid names via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_name.title_zh: 以完整名称指定的目标语言;与 language_code 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效名称。

language_code.desc_en: Target language given by its short code; supply either this or language_name. Look up valid codes via the locations_and_languages endpoint.
language_code.title_zh: 以简码指定的目标语言;与 language_name 二选一提供。可通过 locations_and_languages 接口查询有效代码。

item_types.desc_en: Restricts results to the listed SERP result types; the first type listed also determines the default ordering of results.
item_types.title_zh: 将结果限定为所列的 SERP 结果类型;数组中的首个类型同时决定结果的默认排序依据。

include_clickstream_data.desc_en: When true, enriches the response with clickstream-based metrics (such as clickstream search volume and gender/age distributions). Leaving it off keeps those fields empty.
include_clickstream_data.title_zh: 为 true 时,在响应中附加基于点击流的指标(如点击流搜索量、性别/年龄分布)。不开启则相关字段为空。

limit.desc_en: Caps how many records are returned in the results array.
limit.title_zh: 限定 results 数组中返回的记录条数上限。

offset.desc_en: Skips this many leading records in the results array, for paging through results.
offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。

historical_serp_mode.desc_en: Controls which SERPs are counted: live keeps only SERPs where the target currently ranks, while lost keeps SERPs where it ranked before but no longer does.
historical_serp_mode.title_zh: 控制纳入统计的 SERP 范围:live 仅保留目标当前仍有排名的 SERP,lost 则保留目标曾经有过、现已失去排名的 SERP。

ignore_synonyms.desc_en: When true, collapses highly similar keywords and returns only the core keyword of each cluster.
ignore_synonyms.title_zh: 为 true 时,合并高度相似的关键词,每个簇仅返回核心关键词。

filters.desc_en: Conditions that narrow the result set; combine clauses with the and / or logical operators. Reference fields by their response dotpath (e.g. metrics.organic.pos_1).
filters.title_zh: 用于收窄结果集的筛选条件;子句之间以 and / or 逻辑运算符组合。字段以其响应点路径引用(如 metrics.organic.pos_1)。
filters.annotation: 源码描述的运算符与最大条件数在各接口间不一致且部分符号被渲染截断，具体可用运算符与上限请以原生 description 为准，待研发确认。

order_by.desc_en: Sorting rules over the same fields usable in filters; each rule pairs a field with an asc or desc direction.
order_by.title_zh: 针对 filters 中可用字段的排序规则;每条规则将一个字段与 asc 或 desc 方向配对。

tag.desc_en: Free-form label you attach to the task so you can match it to its result later; echoed back in the response data object.
tag.title_zh: 你为任务附加的自定义标签,便于事后将任务与结果对应;会在响应的 data 对象中原样回传。

version.desc_en: API version that produced this response.
version.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本。

status_code.desc_en: Overall status code for the response; inspect it before reading results and handle non-success codes accordingly.
status_code.title_zh: 本响应的总体状态码;读取结果前应先检查,并对非成功状态码做相应处理。

status_message.desc_en: Human-readable message that accompanies the overall status code.
status_message.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明信息。

time.desc_en: Wall-clock time spent producing the response, in seconds.
time.title_zh: 生成响应所耗费的时间,单位为秒。

cost.desc_en: Total charge for all tasks in this response, in USD.
cost.title_zh: 本响应中所有任务的合计费用,单位为美元。

tasks_count.desc_en: Number of task objects in the tasks array.
tasks_count.title_zh: tasks 数组中任务对象的数量。

offset.title_zh: 跳过 results 数组开头的指定条数记录,用于分页浏览结果。
